notes: Certified exact-board conversion/material claim beats opening and retrieval context; source context remains context only.
Raw engine swing without bounded Certification evidence cannot become lead or support truth.
Engine E influences selection only after bounded same-root Certification evidence exists.
Source context refs inside a board claim remain non-authoritative and cannot become current-position truth.
EngineCertification refs cannot select a Certification claim unless same-root bounded Certification evidence is also present.
S24 is same-target forcing realization only; generic tactic pictures are not S24 lead truth.
S24 projection selection remains public-closed even when same_target_forcing_realization and same_target_conversion_certified scaffold evidence are both present.
A complete-looking S24 scaffold claim is blocker-only until a descriptor-certified RuntimeK region exists.
Admitted Sxx can lead only with exact lower carrier, allowed projection evidence kind, and same-board binding; stale rival is suppressed.
Raw engine refs inside another layer remain raw_engine_only and cannot become truth or support.
Raw engine lower carriers inside Certification, Delta, Object, or other non-Projection board claims remain raw_engine_only and cannot become truth.
Sxx lower carriers cannot be raw engine refs.
Sxx lower carriers must carry exact owner, anchor, route, and scope binding.
SupportOnly and Deferred are endpoints and cannot become lead.
Context-only outline is allowed only when no stronger exact-board lead exists.
Retrieval snippets are references only and cannot become current-position truth.
Opening context can appear only as contextOnly when no exact-board lead exists; it is not best-move, theory-truth, or proof.
Motif source examples can appear as contextOnly only when the source motif id matches an exact detector-carrier evidence id.
Endgame-study context can appear only after exact material and placement applicability and cannot claim result or conversion.
Retrieval examples can appear only as non-authoritative references when no exact-board lead exists.
An exact-board lead keeps opening/retrieval source context bounded to support/context and prevents source truth promotion.
Ambiguous opening transpositions are downgraded or suppressed and cannot become contextOnly output.
Opening source context carrying specific game/player/event/URL citation remains retrieval-lane material and cannot enter selected context or rendered evidence.
Motif tags without exact detector carrier remain source examples only and cannot become current-position motif truth.
Endgame-study context cannot declare win, draw, loss, forced line, or forced conversion.
Retrieval snippets remain non-authoritative and cannot be promoted to current-position truth.
GameContext, practicality, tablebase, and result-service source families remain deferred or rejected outside source-context fallback.
Dependent claim with wrong owner, anchor, route, or scope is suppressed.
Ambiguous side_to_move, beneficiary, or defender fails closed before lead selection.
Competing Sxx claims must be nonredundant by owner, anchor, route, and scope before scoring.
Contract bucket priority is applied before impact score, so a certified mustLead conversion beats a higher-scored Sxx shouldLead projection.

In the S07/S08/S21 initiative-release-counterplay cluster, an exact admitted S07 lead can keep nonredundant S21 support while adjacent S08, support-only, raw-engine, source-context, and renderer-strength shortcuts are suppressed.
S21 counterplay survival selection fails closed when evidence or lower carriers name the wrong owner, anchor, route, or scope.
S15 passer creation can lead only from an admitted same-candidate creation route, while S13/S14 remain support and opening context stays non-authoritative.
S16 passer suppression can lead only from an admitted same-enemy-passer route; raw engine and retrieval examples cannot become current-position truth.
S13/S14 may support S15 only when their support role preserves the same candidate owner and anchor; they do not become S15 truth owners.
Same-candidate S13/S14 structural claims remain support for an admitted S15 owner even when their impact scores are higher.
Existing-passer-only and split-anchor creation shortcuts cannot admit S15 passer creation.
A blocker shell without same-enemy-passer suppression support cannot admit S16.
S15 selection requires Root candidate_passer plus a frozen S13/S14 same-candidate route; forged carrier kind or generic passer route is suppressed.
S16 selection requires enemy Witness passed_pawn_entity_state plus a frozen same-enemy suppression route; forged carrier kind or generic hold route is suppressed.
S16 same-enemy suppression fails closed when owner and defender identify the same side.
S15/S16 same-bucket conflict requires clear beneficiary, defender, side-to-move, and typed rival suppression.
S17 liability relief can lead only from admitted same-piece liability anchor plus typed repair or exchange relief carrier.
S18 bishop-pair conversion can lead only from admitted bishop-pair state and route-specific conversion support.
S19 simplification can lead only from TradeInvariant delta plus route-specific material or hold certification support.
S22 hold can lead only from certified fortress or perpetual hold route evidence.
S19 simplification cannot steal same-piece S17 liability-relief truth; generic relief wording is suppressed.
S19 simplification cannot steal same-anchor S18 bishop-pair conversion truth; unbacked conversion is suppressed.
S22 certified hold suppresses same-scope S19 hold simplification when hold ownership is clearer.
Conversion claims without route-specific support are suppressed when certified hold contradicts conversion.
Fully backed S18 conversion remains below same-anchor S22 hold unless result/material impact and route-specific certification justify conversion.
S18 can outrank same-anchor S22 hold only through bishop_pair_to_material plus bound bishop_pair_material_conversion_certified evidence and sufficient result/material impact.
S17/S18/S19/S22 cluster selection rejects wrong owner/anchor/route/scope, raw engine, and source/retrieval false leads.
S17/S18/S19/S22 declared projection evidence must be bound to the same owner, anchor, route, and scope as the selected claim.
S01 king-wing storm can lead only from admitted same-king storm route carriers, contact-source anchor, and bound king_wing_storm_route_certified evidence.
S02 king-ring concentration can lead only from admitted AttackScaffold plus CertifiedKingSafetyEdge support and bound king_ring_concentration_route_certified evidence.
S03 diagonal king attack can lead only from admitted diagonal lane, attack scaffold, ComparativeKingFragility, CertifiedKingSafetyEdge, and bound diagonal_king_attack_route_certified evidence.

S04 king-shelter breach can lead only from defender-owned KingSafetyShell plus same-owner CertifiedKingSafetyEdge support and bound king_shelter_breach_route_certified evidence; support_break_breach also requires diagonal lane support.
Same defending king S01/S02/S03/S04 claims remain nonredundant when owner, route, and anchor keep distinct exact attack claims.
King-attack selection rejects wrong defending king, wrong owner, wrong route, generic attack wording, source motif context, and retrieval false leads.
S03 requires both fragility and king-safety certification, while S04 accepts defender-owned KingSafetyShell and requires diagonal support for support_break_breach.
Raw engine eval, SupportOnly king-attack claims, and Deferred king-attack claims cannot become attack truth leads.
A certified result owner can outrank a qualified king-attack projection, while raw engine eval remains suppressed.
Bounded EngineCertification can influence ranking only after same-root Certification and a same-binding typed Root/Witness/Object/Delta board reason are present.
Engine-certified eval swing with only opaque Certification plus EngineCertification evidence cannot become lead.
Board-explainable admitted Sxx projection beats a larger opaque engine-certified eval swing without a same-binding board reason.
Engine-certified result/material Certification can beat Sxx only when tied to same-root Certification and same-binding typed board reason evidence.
Stale, wrong-node, wrong-FEN, wrong-route, or wrong-engine-config EngineCertification refs are suppressed before ranking.
MultiPV ambiguity remains deferred/non-leading after CertificationEngineEvidenceContract rejection and cannot become best-defense explanation.
Untyped mate/cp score comparison remains support-only/non-leading unless normalized by the certification contract.
Eval swing is ignored for ranking unless the claim is Certification with bounded engine certification evidence.
Duplicate suppression is scoped to competing Sxx projections, not cross-layer carrier/support claims with the same owner-anchor-route-scope key.

S01-S25 vocabulary has selector fixture coverage when already admitted with exact owner/anchor/route/scope binding and row-specific lower-carrier role shape; S24 public-closed behavior is covered by its separate blocker row.
Outline builder maps selector lead to main without choosing a new lead or changing the selected bucket.
Selected source context soft reasons are preserved as context boundary metadata rather than suppressed or promoted.
Selector suppressedClaims map to blocked do-not-say entries and cannot be revived by the builder.
